layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16. Use whitespace intentionally.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px max). Keep edges relatively sharp.

components.header: Sticky, glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200. Always visible navigation links on desktop.
components.hero_section: Asymmetric bento grid or pure 2-column. Left align big text, huge high-res image on right. No heavy blanket overlays.
components.product_card: Cardless design. Product image inside a bg-zinc-100 container, aspect-square. Text left-aligned below. Hover: Image scale 105%. No card borders.
components.buttons: Solid black (bg-zinc-950 text-white) for primary. Sharp padding px-6 py-3. No extreme pill shapes (rounded-md max).
components.admin_dashboard: Control Room Grid. Tight gaps (gap-4). Dense, functional, 1px borders, no shadows. Use Shadcn Table and Recharts.
components.forms_checkout: Shadcn components heavily customized to remove Vercel look. 1px solid border on inputs, pure white background.
components.cart_drawer: Use Shadcn Sheet. Clean layout, high contrast total price.

motion.page_load: framer-motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)
motion.image_zoom: overflow-hidden container, scale-105 on hover for product images

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements, links, buttons, and forms (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button').
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' (weights 400, 500, 600, 700) and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500, 600) in index.html.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Headings must be 'Outfit'.
Build Shadcn components but override the default rounded-md to match the layout rules (max 8px / rounded-lg).
Ensure header is sticky and uses `backdrop-blur-xl` and `bg-white/70`.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided media URLs.
Implement a mobile-first responsive grid for the product catalog.
Ensure all text over gray or transparent backgrounds meets minimum contrast ratios.
For the admin dashboard, utilize Shadcn tables and Recharts, maintaining a sharp, cardless aesthetic with 1px borders.
